name: obsidian-cli-plugins
description: Obsidian vault records, tasks, projects, plugin commands, safe reads, and Git sync automation.

interface.shortDescription: Obsidian vault records, tasks, projects, and sync
interface.longDescription: Automates configured Obsidian vault workflows through bundled Python scripts, including doctor checks, journal records, Tasks todos, project records, attachment-backed records, safe vault reads/searches, plugin commands, and Git-backed sync.
